title: Iron Ore Inventories Could Signal A Pick Up In Tonne Mile Demand
section_path: Iron Ore Inventories Could Signal A Pick Up In Tonne Mile Demand
section_path_text: Iron Ore Inventories Could Signal A Pick Up In Tonne Mile Demand
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
There is always the risk that any analysis of the iron ore markets gets rather China-centric. However, as the country accounts for around seventy per cent of global seaborne iron ore imports, events and new policies in China will significantly impact prices and volumes. The early parts of the year suggested that China was on course for yet more annual records for iron ore imports and steel production.
